document_chunks.text:
## BLADEFINS - Faction Equipment
Friendly **MURDERWING** operatives can perform the following unique action:
### SLICE FROM ABOVE [1AP]
**BOOST** action. Inflict D3+1 damage on one enemy operative within this operative's **BOOST ZONE**.

An operative cannot perform this action normally. Instead it performs this action during the **Fall Back** or **Reposition** action after setting up from a **BOOST**. A **DEPREDATOR** operative cannot perform this action during the same activation in which it performed the **Carving Blow** action (or vice versa).

metadata.summary: Friendly operatives perform SLICE FROM ABOVE 1AP BOOST during Fall Back or Reposition after BOOST inflicting D3+1 damage with Depredator mutual exclusion from Carving Blow.

document_chunks.text:
## BOOST ACTIONS - Faction Rule
Some actions are known as **BOOST** actions. These are actions performed during other actions when a **BOOST** is used. Each operative cannot perform more than one **BOOST** action per activation/counteraction.

Most **BOOST** actions affect enemy operatives within a friendly **MURDERWING** operative's **BOOST ZONE**. This is the horizontal area between a friendly **MURDERWING** operative's current location and the location from which it used **BOOST**. A marker the same size as the operative's base can be temporarily placed to help determine this. Enemy operatives with any part of their base underneath Vantage terrain are not within friendly **MURDERWING** operatives' **BOOST ZONES**.

metadata.summary: BOOST actions occur during other actions when BOOST is used with one per activation/counteraction affecting enemies in BOOST ZONE between current and BOOST origin location excluding those under Vantage terrain.

document_chunks.text:
## Action restriction: Performing the same action more than once
An operative cannot perform the same action more than once during its activation – this is known as action restrictions.
> **Note**: This restriction only applies during the operative's activation. An operative can perform an action during its activation even if it performed the same action outside its activation in the same turning point (e.g., during **counteract**, during another operative's activation, or during the **Strategy phase**).
document_chunks.header: Action restriction: Performing the same action more than once

metadata.summary: An operative cannot perform the same action more than once during its own activation, though it can perform actions outside its activation in the same turning point.
metadata.header: Action restriction: Performing the same action more than once

document_chunks.text:
## WINGS OF DARKNESS - Firefight Ploy
Use this firefight ploy when a friendly **MURDERWING** operative is performing the **Fall Back** or **Reposition** action, when it does a **BOOST**. That operative can be set up an additional 3" away during that **BOOST** (adding this to the permitted move distance), but it cannot perform the **Shoot**, **Fight** or **Carving Blow** (see **DEPREDATOR** operative) action until the next turning point. You cannot use this ploy during the first turning point.

metadata.summary: BOOST during Fall Back or Reposition adds 3" but prevents Shoot Fight or Carving Blow until next turning point not first turning point.

document_chunks.text:
## MURDERWING - MURDERWING DEPREDATOR
**Stats:**
- APL: 3
- Move: 6"
- Save: 3+
- Wounds: 14

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ranged | Bolt pistol | 4 | 3+ | 3/4 | **Range 8"** |
| melee | Great chainaxe | 5 | 4+ | 5/7 | **Brutal** |

**Keywords:** MURDERWING, CHAOS, HERETIC ASTARTES, DEPREDATOR

### MURDERWING DEPREDATOR - Horrifying Dismemberment
Whenever this operative **incapacitates** an enemy operative while fighting or retaliating, select one other enemy operative **visible** to and **within 3"** of either this operative or the **incapacitated** enemy operative. Subtract 1 from that enemy operative's APL stat until the end of its next activation.

### MURDERWING DEPREDATOR - CARVING BLOW [1AP]
Inflict 2D3 damage on each other operative **visible** to and **within 2"** of this operative in an order of your choice (roll separately for each).

For the purposes of action restrictions and the **Astartes** faction rule, this action is treated as a **Fight** action. This operative cannot perform this action while it has a **Conceal** order, or during the same activation in which it performed the **Slice From Above** action (see faction equipment) or vice versa.

metadata.summary: Incapacitating enemies debuffs visible 3" APL by 1 until next activation and performs CARVING BLOW BOOST action inflicting 2D3 damage on visible 2" enemies treated as Fight with restrictions.

document_chunks.text:
## MURDERWING - ASTARTES - Faction Rule
During each friendly **MURDERWING** operative's activation, it can perform either two **Shoot** actions or two **Fight** actions. If it's two **Shoot** actions, a bolt pistol must be selected for at least one of them.

Each friendly **MURDERWING** operative can **counteract** regardless of its order.

metadata.summary: Friendly MURDERWING operatives perform two Shoot or two Fight actions per activation requiring bolt pistol for at least one Shoot and can counteract regardless of order.

document_chunks.text:
## MALICIOUS NARCISSISM - Firefight Ploy
Use this firefight ploy when it's your turn to activate with a friendly operative, if only one friendly **MURDERWING** operative is ready. Until the end of the turning point, whenever any ready enemy operatives are in the killzone, you can skip your activations (in other words, you can delay that friendly **MURDERWING** operative's activation). Note that you cannot **counteract** until that friendly **MURDERWING** operative is expended.

metadata.summary: With one ready friendly delays activation until end of turning point if enemies ready preventing counteractions until expended.

document_chunks.text:
## MURDERWING - MURDERWING WARP TALON
**Stats:**
- APL: 3
- Move: 6"
- Save: 3+
- Wounds: 14

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| melee | Lightning claws | 5 | 3+ | 4/5 | **Ceaseless**, **Lethal 5+**, **Rending** |

**Keywords:** MURDERWING, CHAOS, HERETIC ASTARTES, WARP TALON

### MURDERWING WARP TALON - Slice the Veil
When setting up this operative before the battle, you can set it up in the warp instead: place it to one side instead of in the killzone. In the first Firefight phase, when this operative is activated, place one of your Warp markers **wholly within** your territory, then expend this operative.

In the second Firefight phase, when this operative is activated, set it up with an order of your choice in a location it can be placed either **wholly within** your drop zone, or **wholly within** your territory contesting your Warp marker. Continue its activation as normal, but during that activation it cannot perform more than two actions and cannot use more than 4" of move distance. Until the Ready step of the next Strategy phase, this operative is **obscured** to operatives more than 3" from it.

Whenever this operative is in the warp, it cannot be the ready friendly **MURDERWING** operative for the **Malicious Narcissism** firefight ploy.

metadata.summary: Sets up in warp first turning point emerging second via Warp marker in territory or drop zone with 2 actions 4" move limit and obscured beyond 3" until next Ready step excluding from ploy readiness.

document_chunks.text:
## NIGHTMARE ON HIGH - Strategy Ploy
Whenever an operative is shooting a friendly **MURDERWING** operative that's at least 2" higher than the killzone floor, or that did a **BOOST** during this turning point, you can re-roll one of your defence dice.

metadata.summary: Re-roll one defence die when shot by enemies against operative 2"+ above floor or that BOOSTed this turning point.

document_chunks.text:
## WARP FUEL - Faction Equipment
Once per turning point, when an enemy operative ends the **Fall Back** action during its activation, if at least one friendly **MURDERWING** operative was within its **control range** at the start of that action, you can use this rule. One of those friendly operatives can immediately perform a free **Reposition** or **Charge** action, but cannot use more than 3" of move distance. Note that if the enemy operative doesn't perform the **Fall Back** action during its own activation, this has no effect.

metadata.summary: Once per turning point after enemy Fall Back from friendly control range one friendly performs free 3" Reposition or Charge.

document_chunks.text:
## MURDERWING - MURDERWING CURSECLAW
**Stats:**
- APL: 3
- Move: 6"
- Save: 3+
- Wounds: 14

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ranged | Bolt pistol | 4 | 3+ | 3/4 | **Range 8"** |
| melee | Mutated claws | 5 | 3+ | 4/5 | **Rending** |

**Keywords:** MURDERWING, CHAOS, HERETIC ASTARTES, CURSECLAW

### MURDERWING CURSECLAW - Frenzied Attack
If this operative is **incapacitated** during the **Fight** action, you can strike the enemy operative in that sequence with one of your unresolved successes before this operative is removed from the killzone.

### MURDERWING CURSECLAW - SNATCH [1AP]
**BOOST** action. Select one enemy operative within this operative's **BOOST ZONE**. Both players roll one D6 and add their respective operative's Wounds stat to their result. If your result is higher, remove that enemy operative from the killzone and set it back up within this operative's **BOOST ZONE** or **control range**. It must be set up in a location it can be placed and cannot be set up further away from this operative than where it began. If that enemy operative is set up within this operative's **control range**, the **Fall Back** or **Reposition** action ends (allowing this operative to end that action within **control range** of enemy operatives).

This operative cannot perform this action normally. Instead, it performs this action during the **Fall Back** or **Reposition** action after setting up from a **BOOST**.

metadata.summary: If incapacitated during Fight strikes once before removal and performs SNATCH BOOST action during Fall Back or Reposition after BOOST to contest enemy via Wounds contest potentially ending own action in enemy control range.

document_chunks.text:
## PREDATORS ABOVE - Strategy Ploy
Whenever a friendly **MURDERWING** operative is at least 2" higher than the killzone floor, its weapons have the **Balanced** weapon rule. Whenever a friendly **MURDERWING** operative does a **BOOST**, its weapons have the **Balanced** weapon rule until the end of that activation.

metadata.summary: Weapons gain Balanced when operative 2"+ above floor or after BOOST for activation.

document_chunks.text:
## MURDERWING - MURDERWING RAPTOR
**Stats:**
- APL: 3
- Move: 6"
- Save: 3+
- Wounds: 14

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ranged | Bolt pistol | 4 | 3+ | 3/4 | **Range 8"** |
| ranged | Plasma pistol (standard) | 4 | 3+ | 3/5 | **Range 8"**, **Piercing 1** |
| ranged | Plasma pistol (supercharge) | 4 | 3+ | 4/5 | **Range 8"**, **Hot**, **Lethal 5+**, **Piercing 1** |
| melee | Chainsword | 5 | 3+ | 4/5 | |

**Keywords:** MURDERWING, CHAOS, HERETIC ASTARTES, RAPTOR

### MURDERWING RAPTOR - Thrill of Flight
Whenever this operative does a **BOOST** during its activation:
- You can remove any changes to its APL stat.
- You can ignore any changes to its stats from being injured (including its weapons' stats) until the end of the activation.

metadata.summary: BOOST during activation removes APL changes and ignores injury stat penalties until activation end.

document_chunks.text:
## MURDERWING - MURDERWING HUNTMASTER
**Stats:**
- APL: 3
- Move: 6"
- Save: 3+
- Wounds: 14

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ranged | Bolt pistol | 4 | 3+ | 3/4 | **Range 8"** |
| melee | Power weapon | 5 | 3+ | 4/6 | **Lethal 5+** |

**Keywords:** MURDERWING, CHAOS, HERETIC ASTARTES, HUNTMASTER

### MURDERWING HUNTMASTER - Pinned Prey
Whenever an enemy operative would perform the **Fall Back** action while within **control range** of this operative, if no other enemy operatives are within this operative's **control range**, you can use this rule. If you do, roll two D6, or one D6 if that enemy operative has a higher Wounds stat than this operative. If any result is a 4+, that enemy operative cannot perform that action during that activation/counteraction (no AP are spent on it).

### MURDERWING HUNTMASTER - STRIKE FROM ABOVE [1AP]
**BOOST** action. Inflict 2D3+1 damage on one enemy operative within this operative's **BOOST ZONE**.

This operative cannot perform this action normally. Instead, it performs this action during the **Fall Back** or **Reposition** action after setting up from a **BOOST**.

metadata.summary: Prevents isolated enemy Fall Backs via D6 roll 4+ test based on Wounds and performs STRIKE FROM ABOVE BOOST action during Fall Back or Reposition after BOOST inflicting 2D3+1 damage.

document_chunks.text:
## ACCELERANT AGENTS - Strategy Ploy
During each friendly **HUNTER CLADE RUSTSTALKER** operative's activation, it can perform two **Fight** actions, and one of them can be free.

metadata.summary: Enables friendly Hunter Clade Ruststalkers to perform two Fight actions per activation with one free

document_chunks.text:
## DIVERT AND DISAPPEAR - Strategy Ploy
Up to three friendly **WYRMBLADE** operatives can immediately perform a free **Dash** or **Charge** action in an order of your choice (choose separately for each, and for the latter, it cannot move more than 3"). If a **WYRMBLADE CULT AGENT** operative is selected for this ploy, it counts as two operatives, and it can perform a free **Fall Back** action instead (it cannot move more than 3"); if it does, subtract 1 from its APL stat until the end of its next activation.

metadata.summary: Up to three friendly Wyrblade operatives perform free Dash or limited Charge, with Cult Agents counting as two and able to Fall Back limited with -1 APL until next activation end.

document_chunks.text:
## INQUISITORIAL AGENTS - TEMPESTUS SCION VOX-OPERATOR
**Stats:**
- APL: 2
- Move: 6"
- Save: 4+
- Wounds: 8

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ranged | Hot-shot lasgun | 4 | 3+ | 3/4 | |
| melee | Gun butt | 3 | 4+ | 2/3 | |

**Keywords:** INQUISITORIAL AGENT, IMPERIUM, ASTRA MILITARUM, TEMPESTUS SCION, VOX-OPERATOR

### TEMPESTUS SCION VOX-OPERATOR - SIGNAL [1AP]
**SUPPORT.** Select one other friendly **INQUISITORIAL AGENT** operative in the killzone. Until the end of that operative's next activation, add 1 to its APL stat.
This operative can perform this action twice during its activation, but cannot perform this action while within **control range** of an enemy operative.

metadata.summary: 1AP Support Signal [twice per activation] adds +1 APL to friendly until end of its next activation, not in enemy control range.

document_chunks.text:
## INSTIL FEAR - Strategy Ploy
Whenever a friendly **MURDERWING** operative is fighting, Normal Dmg of 3 or more inflicts 1 less damage on it.

metadata.summary: Normal Damage 3+ inflicts 1 less during Fight.

document_chunks.text:
## BONDS OF UNITY - Strategy Ploy
Whenever a friendly **XV26 STEALTH BATTLESUIT** operative is activated (excluding **DRONE**), if it's **visible** to and **within 6"** of another friendly **XV26 STEALTH BATTLESUIT** operative (excluding **DRONE**), you can ignore any changes to that first friendly operative's APL stat and select one of the following:
- Ignore any changes to that first friendly operative's Move stat from being injured until the end of that activation.
- Ignore any changes to the Hit stat of that first friendly operative's weapons from being injured until the end of that activation.

metadata.summary: Activated non-Drone XV26 Stealth Battlesuit visible within 6" of another non-Drone ignores APL changes and either Move or weapon Hit injury penalties until end of activation.

document_chunks.text:
## CLAWED ARMOUR - Faction Equipment
Friendly **MURDERWING** operatives can perform the following unique action:
### CLAWED CHARGE [0AP]
**BOOST** action. Inflict 1 damage on one enemy operative within this operative's **control range**, then the **Charge** action ends.

An operative cannot perform this action normally. Instead, it performs this action during the **Charge** action after setting up from a **BOOST**.

metadata.summary: Friendly operatives perform CLAWED CHARGE 0AP BOOST during Charge after BOOST inflicting 1 damage in control range ending Charge.

hop_evaluations.reasoning: MURDERWING DEPREDATOR and MURDERWING ASTARTES faction rules are in Retrieved Context, describing Carving Blow as a BOOST action and allowing two Shoot or Fight actions. However, core rules defining BOOST actions, what constitutes performing the same action more than once, and general action restrictions per activation are missing but available in Core Rules.
hop_evaluations.missing_query: BOOST ACTIONS, Action restriction: Performing the same action more than once
